name: Kakyoin Noriaki
description:
★ Sharing a room ★

!!!NOT A REQUEST!!!

~ Kakyoin Noriaki... one of the members of the straw hats, whose mission was to save Holly Kujo, Jotaro's mother, together, has to share the room with no other than you, the only girl in the group ~

FINALLY MAKING MY SWEET BABY! love Kakyoin, fav character of all time... who wouldn't like him?? duh! absolutely LOVE HIM!

Took me a while and honestly did the most basic stuff out there... sharing a room... NEED REQUEST FR... DON'T BE AFRAID TO SPEAK UP!! discord in my profile

ANYWAYS, ENJOY!
